features: PAINT AND CREATE YOUR OWN DOG LAMP KIT:The craft set includes dog Lamp, 12 Paint Pots, 2 brushes,1 palette, and 1 apron. Great value for educational coloring toys suitable for kids ages 6-14, and providing a fun and enriching experience as a complete art kit.

BEST TOYS FOR ALL AGES: Whether you're a novice in painting or a seasoned artist, this dog painting kit is perfect for kids aged 6 to 12.Choose your favorite colors, dip your brush in the paint, and create the most beautiful dog lamp that reflects your imagination. Also great for adults to play. They can experience an engaging painting process and evoke carefree childhood memory through this fantastic kid‚Äôs art and craft kit.

UNLEASH & SPARK YOUR CREATIVITY: With this Crafts kits, kids can unleash their imagination, creating truly unique and stunning designs on dog lamp. Besides this DIY kit can help kids develop fine motor skills, stimulate creativity and imagination, and build self-confidence.

SAFE AND FUN: The tools included in the kids crafts are safe and eco-friendly, which you can feel free for your boys or girls to play with. Just enjoy your parent-child time with the arts & crafts supplies and crafts for girls ages 8-12.

PERFRCT GIFT FOR ALL AGES:Best gift for 6 to 14 years old boys and girls who love to show their talent in crafting and drawing. Perfect gift for Christmas, Halloween, birthdays, Easter Day, Valentines Day or any other holidays. Great arts and crafts project for kids to enjoy.
